title: Low Fire One Pixel
description: The low fire that's only one pixel tall
body:
**Low Fire One Pixel**
---
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-5865F2?logo=discord&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/A2Nx9kxDeB) [![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/Modrinth-1bd96a?logo=modrinth&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://modrinth.com/user/cutebow)
--- Makes it so that fire is 1 pixel tall, this helps you see where fire is clearly while also not having it too high that its not in the way. and the pack icon is clear showing what looks like in game so when switching packs you know exactly what it looks like ---
![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Kmumkgb6/images/4b424e87dd35454bb4d9cc81100750e80a0feabd.png) _This is what it looks like in game!_
--- This pack is updated for newer versions and should work for almost every version you can think of! Download Some mods! [![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/Modrinth-1bd96a?logo=modrinth&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://modrinth.com/user/cutebow) Join my Discord for more packs/mods!
